contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body:
If you need help with an order, custom decor consultation, or product details, reach out to us anytime.

Email: support@shandecor.in
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Address: Shan Decor, New Delhi, India

Business Hours:
Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.body:
By using Shan Decor, you agree to these terms. Product prices and availability may change without prior notice. Orders may be cancelled in case of payment failure, inventory mismatch, or policy violations.

Users must provide accurate billing and shipping details. Any misuse of the website, content scraping, or fraudulent transactions may result in account suspension.

All trademarks, images, and content belong to Shan Decor unless otherwise stated.

refunds.title: Refunds and Cancellation Policy
refunds.body:
Orders can be cancelled before dispatch. Once shipped, cancellation is not guaranteed.

If a payment is successful but order confirmation fails, contact support with transaction details.

Refunds for approved cancellations or returns are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after verification.

Damaged or wrong items must be reported within 48 hours of delivery with photos.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.body:
We currently ship across India. Shipping timelines depend on destination and product availability. Typical dispatch time is 1-3 business days, and delivery is usually completed in 3-8 business days.

Shipping charges (if applicable) are shown during checkout. Delays due to weather, courier issues, or force majeure are outside our control.

For large or fragile decor items, additional handling time may apply.
